payload.title: Per-user API keys: CLI create/list/revoke + SCOPE_API_KEY in sync client
payload.description: Expose createApiKey/listApiKeys/revokeApiKey (src/auth_hosted/apikeys.js) via scope CLI commands so users mint their own named, revocable keys. Make src/sync-client.js + scope sync send the key (Authorization: Bearer scope_...) and the per-request --model/X-Scope-Model. Replaces the shared --token for hosted sync.
